argument: Significant insider selling is a textbook distribution signal that contradicts the headline momentum, and an RSI of 58.5 paired with a 17.36% 3-month run shows the easy gains are already priced in. Stacked on top of unresolved China export controls, Taiwan/TSMC supply concentration, and stretched valuation multiples, the asymmetric risk now favors trimming exposure rather than waiting for the first earnings miss or policy headline to compress the multiple violently.
